narrative:
Warren City 2G (precinct in Trumbull County) has 670 registered voters, with 66.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.9 percentage points.
